name: Navigator Global Investments Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5700, stop A$2.2869, target A$3.0450 (1.68:1) — then trail it.
